query:
SELECT cohort_month, 'Invited'         AS stage, 1 AS stage_order, toUInt64(n_invited)         AS value FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_invite_funnel_cohort_monthly
    UNION ALL
    SELECT cohort_month, '≥2 mint-days'    AS stage, 2 AS stage_order, toUInt64(n_minted_2_days)   AS value FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_invite_funnel_cohort_monthly
    UNION ALL
    SELECT cohort_month, '≥7 mint-days'    AS stage, 3 AS stage_order, toUInt64(n_minted_7_days)   AS value FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_invite_funnel_cohort_monthly
    UNION ALL
    SELECT cohort_month, '≥14 mint-days'   AS stage, 4 AS stage_order, toUInt64(n_minted_14_days)  AS value FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_invite_funnel_cohort_monthly
    UNION ALL
    SELECT cohort_month, 'Active Minter'   AS stage, 5 AS stage_order, toUInt64(n_active_minter)   AS value FROM dbt.api_execution_circles_v2_invite_funnel_cohort_monthly
    ORDER BY cohort_month, stage_order
